privileged_info_summary: The task references 4 draft orders for processing. Verified customers: johndoe, janesmith, and mikewilson exist. Two product SKUs are verified (SONY-WH1000XM5 at $348, LOGI-MXM3S at $99.99). However, two product SKUs in metadata (SAM-S24ULTRA and APPLE-APP2) do NOT exist in the seeded database. The seed contains 'Samsung 65-inch 4K QLED Smart TV' (SKU: SAMSUNG-QN65Q80C) instead of the referenced Galaxy S24 Ultra, and 'Apple MacBook Air M2 13-inch' (SKU: APPLE-MBA-M2-13) instead of Apple AirPods Pro 2. Expected states are valid Drupal Commerce states (completed, fulfillment, validation, canceled). Task setup will fail to create orders 3 and 4 due to non-existent product SKUs.
